$myvar = 0

class ntp(
  $newName = $ntp::params::server
) inherits ntp::params {

  notify { 'ntp':
    message   => "server=[${newName}]",
    test      => "${1+1 == 2}",
    more_test => "sdflkjs${
      $newName == "sdf${
        $newName + "$newName$newName${newName}"
      }sdf"
    }"
  }

}

$testvar = 0

class ntp_child inherits ntp {

  $myvar = 4
  class sybclass {
    $testvar=3

  }
  $testvar = 1
}
